entry.summary: (NON-DOCUMENT) ATTORNEY APPEARANCE of Katie Beran on behalf of plaintiff People of the State of Michigan (Beran, Katie)

entry.title: Entry #14 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: ORDER that Defendants BP P.L.C., BP America Inc., BP Energy Company, BP Energy Retail Company LLC, and BP Products North America Inc. file a corporate disclosure statement within 7 days; signed by District Judge Jane M. Beckering (rmw) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #13 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: ORDER granting proposed stipulated order regarding service and briefing schedule 11 ; signed by District Judge Jane M. Beckering (rmw) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-02-20 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: (NON-DOCUMENT) ATTORNEY APPEARANCE of Brian David Schmalzbach on behalf of defendant American Petroleum Institute (Schmalzbach, Brian)

entry.title: Entry #12 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: ORDER that Defendants Chevron Corporation, Chevron U.S.A. Inc., Shell P.L.C., Shell USA, Inc., Shell Oil Products Company LLC, Equilon Enterprises LLC, Shell Trading (US) Company, and American Petroleum Institute file a corporate disclosure statement within 7 days; signed by District Judge Jane M. Beckering (rmw) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #11 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: Stipulation and Order (Proposed-one document)

entry.title: Entry #9 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: NOTICE that this case is reassigned to District Judge Jane M. Beckering for all further proceedings pursuant to Order 8 by Judge Paul L. Maloney ; Judge Paul L. Maloney no longer assigned to the case (mlc) (Entered: 01/28/2026)

entry.title: Entry #8 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: ORDER OF RECUSAL: District Judge Paul L. Maloney recused from this case; case to be reassigned; signed by District Judge Paul L. Maloney (Judge Paul L. Maloney, acr) (Entered: 01/28/2026)

entry.title: Entry #7 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: SUMMONS ISSUED as to defendants American Petroleum Institute, BP America Inc., BP Energy Company, BP Energy Retail Company LLC, BP P.L.C., BP Products North America Inc., Chevron Corporation, Chevron U.S.A. Inc., Equilon Enterprises LLC, Exxon Mobil Corporation, ExxonMobil Oil Corporation, Shell Oil Products Company LLC, Shell P.L.C., Shell Trading (US) Company, Shell USA, Inc. (mlc) (Entered: 01/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #6 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: NOTICE that this case has been assigned to Paul L. Maloney (mlc) (Entered: 01/26/2026)
